channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How To Use GenAI Tools To Boost Productivity In 2026—Without AI Slop
item.description: Productivity is being lost, because too many teams are drowning in AI slop, and endless “almost useful” drafts that look impressive but don’t move the...

item.title: Apple iPhone 18 Pro May See Record-Breaking Power Upgrade, Report Says
item.description: A new report says the next flagship iPhone could have an improvement to the feature users love: battery life.

item.title: Egypt’s $1B Charter Makes It MENA Hub For ScalingTech And Brands
item.description: Egypt’s $1B Startup Charter, launched at RiseUp Summit, positions Egypt as a strategic MENA hub for scaling brands, tech platforms, products and AI se...

item.title: Stanford AI Expert Pushes Back Against Too Much Reliance On AI
item.description: Stanford AI expert advises: view AI as an opportunity to collaboratively develop improved processes, rather than as a way to cut jobs.

item.title: With Sprayground, Sandflower Is Sending Her Light Out Into The Galaxy
item.description: From her A.I. collections to a collab with Lucasfilms, Sandflower uses every day as an opportunity to make storytelling part of the best backpack comp...

item.title: Sarcasm self-defeats
item.description: Sarcasm is an easy way to amplify feedback. It has two hidden costs: If you have confidence in your standing and your idea, then sarcasm is simply get...

item.title: Should you keep playing your hit song?
item.description: It depends. A freelancer, a brand, a musician–they’re here to serve. If people come to the restaurant for your famous marinara sauce, if new clients h...

item.title: Blizzard pasttimes
item.description: Millions of folks are about to get snowed in. Stay safe. Here’s a code for last year’s Thriving with AI course on Udemy. It’s free for the first 1,000...

item.title: Brown rice and status
item.description: Rice is one of the most consumed foods in the world, and it gives us insight into our relentless search for status and for affiliation. Once rice is h...

item.title: “Hide competitive stats”
item.description: I’ve been playing an online wordgame for a few months, and after each round, it shows me how well I’m doing against the 10,000 other people who are al...
